plugin.name: switcher
plugin._long: A plugin to change active window with a thumbnail grid animation. Supports arrow key navigation, Enter to select, Escape to cancel.

option.name: next_view
option._long: Switches to the next view with the specified key.

option.name: prev_view
option._long: Switches to the previous view with the specified key.

option.name: speed
option._long: Sets the duration of the animation in milliseconds.

option.name: view_thumbnail_width
option._long: Sets the thumbnail width in pixels. Height is calculated automatically to maintain aspect ratio.

option.name: grid_width_percent
option._long: Sets the total grid width as percentage of screen width (e.g., 90 for 90%).

option.name: selected_scale
option._long: Scale multiplier for the currently selected thumbnail. 1.0 means no zoom, values above 1.0 enlarge the selected view.

option.name: inactive_alpha
option._long: Opacity of non-selected window thumbnails. Lower values make unselected windows more transparent.

option.name: vertical_spacing
option._long: Vertical spacing in pixels between rows of thumbnails.

option.name: background_dim
option._long: Brightness factor for the background while the switcher is active. 1.0 means no dimming, lower values make the background darker.

option.name: click_to_select
option._long: Whether clicking on a thumbnail selects it. Middle-click closes the window regardless of this setting.
